_note: 254 (was 253): +1 net for the CRM-2 workspace (docs/41) — three new irreducible client islands (crm/crm-client.tsx kanban DnD board + tabs; crm/deals/[oppNo]/deal-client.tsx stage stepper + unified timeline; crm/accounts/[accountNo]/account-client.tsx), each behind the canonical RSC server-shell + island split (page.tsx renders/prefetches, the island runs the client-only t() hook, react-query mutations, drag-and-drop state), offset -2 by converting /pipeline and /projects/crm from client pages to pure server redirect components (both routes merged into /crm; the old client /crm retail page moved unchanged to /crm/members, net 0). 253 (was 251): +2 for the deploy-crash safety net — app/global-error.tsx and components/chunk-reload-guard.tsx. Both are irreducibly client: an App Router global-error boundary MUST be a Client Component (Next.js requirement — it catches render/runtime errors and renders its own <html>/<body>), and the guard installs window 'error'/'unhandledrejection' listeners to detect a ChunkLoadError (an old hashed chunk 404ing after a deploy) and self-recover by clearing caches + reloading. Neither can be a server component or an island of an existing client file (they must exist at the root/boundary). Root cause fixed alongside in public/sw.js (network-first HTML so a stale service-worker cache no longer serves old HTML referencing deleted chunks). 239 (was 238): +1 for the Quick Capture page /capture (docs/34) — inherently client-first (camera capture via <input capture>, FileReader→data URL, react-query mutation + live 'my captures' list); a server shell + island split cannot remove the client island. 241 (was 239): +2 for the i18n client-islands localizing the pipeline & financial-health RSC dashboards (PR #410) — both required to run the client-only t() hook on a server-prefetched page. 242 (was 241): +1 for the god Platform Console island (/platform, platform-client.tsx) — an inherently interactive admin surface (company table with row actions, provision/invite dialogs, approve/reject mutations); it already uses the RSC server-shell + island split (page.tsx prefetches), so the island is the irreducible client boundary. 243 (was 242): +1 for the shop/basket requisition page /shop — inherently client-first like /capture (local basket state + qty steppers, per-line urgent toggle, free-text off-catalog request, plus the react-query catalog fetch + checkout mutation); the interactivity IS the page, so a server-shell/island split cannot remove the client island. 244 (was 243): +1 for the budget-restricted project-shop page /shop/project/[code] — same inherently-client shape as /shop (BoQ 'shelf' fetch + local PMR basket with qty steppers + submit mutation raising a PMR against the project's approved BoQ, PROJ-12/13); the interactivity IS the page. 248 (was 244): +4 for the Finance Oracle-grade analytics islands (docs/35) — /finance/command-center, /finance/close-cockpit, /finance/treasury, /finance/profitability. Each is the canonical RSC server-shell + client-island split (page.tsx prefetches via serverApi; the island renders): the island is irreducible because it runs the client-only t() hook (no server-side translation helper exists — cf. accounting/page.tsx 'RSC conversion #1', whose accounting-client.tsx island is the same shape), interactive drill/expand state (useState/useEffect), and the live fin_kpi_refresh SSE (useRealtime). 246 (was 248): -2 — the two app layouts (app/(internal)/layout.tsx, app/portal/layout.tsx) were converted from client to SERVER components. The only thing that had forced them client was passing the icon-bearing INTERNAL_NAV/PORTAL_NAV as a prop (Lucide component refs are non-serializable across the RSC boundary — verified by a web build that failed then passed). AppShell (already a client component) now selects its nav tree internally from a serializable `variant: 'internal'|'portal'` prop, so the layouts pass only serializable props and render the client LanguageProvider/ThemeApplier/AppShell as children (standard RSC composition, cf. RootLayout→ThemeProvider). Net for this PR: +4 islands -2 layouts = +2. 250 (was 246): +4 for the construction/real-estate web workspace (docs/35 Depth-4) — /projects/tenders, /projects/billing, /projects/subcontracts, /realestate. Each is inherently client-first like /shop: create forms + react-query mutations + per-row action buttons (submit/win/lose/award, certify, book/contract/approve/pay) driven by local component state (the just-created draft-valuation map, contract lookup); the interactivity IS the page, so a server-shell/island split cannot remove the client island. 251 (was 250): +1 for the customer-master CRUD page /customers (master-data audit Phase 3) — inherently client-first like /shop and /customers-adjacent /inventory/suppliers: search + create/edit dialogs with local form state, react-query mutations, and a row-click 360° view panel; the interactivity IS the page, so a server-shell/island split cannot remove the client island. Justified exceptions to the down-only ratchet; keep converting other pages to RSC to bring this back down.
